title: 3K Mob Heads! (Decapitation)
description: 3000+ Heads for all Minecraft mobs since 1.14! First to add all 3072 Tropical Fish Heads, with customizable head sounds!
body:
Existed since 1.14, Decapitation is a datapack that adds head drops to all mobs in the game! Heads from all mob variants are supported, including 3072 Tropical Fish Variants, no Resource Packs required!
# 📜 Features: - **Over 3200 different head variants**! - This is the first pack that **adds all 3072 Tropical Fish heads** to Minecraft! - **Head Sources**: Heads show you how you got them! - Gives you bragging rights if the head you got was not easy to get, while making heads more accessible for builders. - **Customizable Head Sounds**: Brush a mobhead to change how it sounds! - You can also get the head with that sound by mining it with said Brush! - Mining it normally removes the sound the head currently has. Helps them stack up easier. - **In-game Settings**: Customize Decapitation to fit your Minecraft worlds! - Change how head drops, head mechanics, and more! - To get started: `/function tdp.config:decapitation` - Works well with [my other datapacks](https://modrinth.com/collection/Zz40EjyL)! - Works in Multiplayer! - Made and maintained with lots of care. Hope you enjoyed it!
![An animated icon showcasing Decapitation's core premise.](https://github.com/TheDiamondPlayables/assets2/blob/main/Datapacks/decapitation/icon_animated.gif?raw=true)
# 🤔 ***It's not working, help!*** - The tropical fish heads were introduced in Minecraft 1.21x, so you won't find them before then. - If you can't access in-game settings or debug commands, **open to LAN and enable Allow Commands**! - If you're in a Server, you'll need to `/op` yourself first! - Before 1.20.5, this option was called **Allow Cheats**. - For any other problems, you can [contact me personally here](https://thediamondplayables.com/contact)! - I'll personally respond to all help requests that's been sent here. Reply times may vary - there's just me working on all this, but I'll always help you out when I can. # 🎉 Special Thanks: Special thanks to these awesome people for keeping the lights on: [![A special thank you board for those who helped me keep the lights on, so I get to do this for you!](https://thediamondplayables.com/helpers)](https://thediamondplayables.com/support) If you like the effort that goes into making all this, [help me keep the lights on](https://thediamondplayables.com/support) so I get to do this more often! # 📝 PS: - Each version **was designed and optimized** for their respective Minecraft release, so you'll always **get the best performance and features possible** for the releases you're playing on. - I could make builds that supports multiple versions at once, but it also means adding extra stuff only to support game releases that it won't be run on. It just doesn't make sense to me. - Due to [Modrinth's limitations](https://thediamondplayables.com/modrinth_notes), this version is **not the best of what I've got**. [![Modrinth Edition notice. It's a simpler version made due to Modrinth's tech limits. You don't get all the features if you're using this release, and some things may not work as intended.](https://github.com/TheDiamondPlayables/assets2/blob/main/Random/modrinth_notice.gif?raw=true)](https://thediamondplayables.com/modrinth_notes)
